---
title: "SAFe Portfolio Hierarchy"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

```{python}
import json
from pathlib import Path
from IPython.display import HTML, display

_candidates = [Path("data/portfolio.json"), Path("../data/portfolio.json")]
data_file = next((p for p in _candidates if p.exists()), None)
if data_file is None:
    raise FileNotFoundError(
        "data/portfolio.json not found. "
        "Run: python NceGitLab.py --report portfolio"
    )

d         = json.loads(data_file.read_text())
group     = d["group"]
summary   = d["summary"]
hierarchy = d["hierarchy"]
```

```{python}
HTML(f"""
<p>
  <strong>Report Date:</strong> {d['report_date']} &nbsp;|&nbsp;
  <strong>Group:</strong> <a href="{group['url']}" target="_blank">{group['name']}</a>
</p>
<p>
  <a href="/interactive/portfolio/index.html"
     style="display:inline-block;padding:4px 12px;background:#c8a951;color:#0a2447;
            border-radius:4px;font-weight:600;text-decoration:none;font-size:13px">
    ⚡ Interactive Version
  </a>
</p>
""")
```

## Portfolio Summary

```{python}
if not summary:
    display(HTML("<p><em>No epics found.</em></p>"))
else:
    html = (
        '<table class="table table-sm table-bordered">'
        "<thead><tr>"
        "<th>Type</th><th>Total</th><th>Open</th><th>Closed</th>"
        "<th>Blocked By</th><th>Blocks</th><th>% Done</th><th>% Through PI</th>"
        "</tr></thead><tbody>"
    )
    for row in summary:
        risk   = " ⚠️" if row["at_risk"] else ""
        pi_str = f"{row['avg_pct_pi']}%{risk}" if row["avg_pct_pi"] is not None else "—"
        html  += (
            f'<tr>'
            f'<td>{row["icon"]} <strong>{row["type"]}</strong></td>'
            f'<td><a href="{row["url_all"]}" target="_blank">{row["total"]}</a></td>'
            f'<td><a href="{row["url_open"]}" target="_blank">{row["open"]}</a></td>'
            f'<td><a href="{row["url_closed"]}" target="_blank">{row["closed"]}</a></td>'
            f'<td>{row["blocked_by"]}</td>'
            f'<td>{row["blocks"]}</td>'
            f'<td>{row["avg_pct_done"]}%</td>'
            f'<td>{pi_str}</td>'
            f'</tr>'
        )
    html += "</tbody></table>"
    display(HTML(html))
```

## Initiative Hierarchy

```{python}
def _render_node(node):
    icon      = node["icon"]
    blk       = '<span style="font-size:0.62em">⛔</span> ' if node["blocked"] else ""
    pct_done  = node["pct_done"]
    pct_pi    = node["pct_pi"]
    pi_str    = f" | PI: {pct_pi}%" if pct_pi is not None else ""
    risk      = " ⚠️" if pct_pi is not None and pct_done < pct_pi else ""
    pw, aw    = node["planned_weight"], node["actual_weight"]
    if pw and aw:
        drift     = node["drift"]
        drift_str = f" | {pw}pt → {aw}pt {'▲' if drift > 0 else '▼' if drift < 0 else '='}"
    elif pw:
        drift_str = f" | {pw}pt planned"
    else:
        drift_str = ""
    label = (
        f'{blk}{icon} <a href="{node["url"]}" target="_blank">{node["title"]}</a> '
        f'<small style="color:#666">(State: {node["state"]} | {pct_done}%{risk}{pi_str}{drift_str})</small>'
    )
    children = node.get("children", [])
    if not children:
        return f"<p style='margin:2px 0'>{label}</p>"
    inner = "".join(_render_node(c) for c in children)
    return (
        f"<details><summary style='cursor:pointer'>{label}</summary>"
        f"<div style='margin-left:1.5em'>{inner}</div></details>"
    )

if not hierarchy:
    display(HTML("<p><em>No epics found in the portfolio.</em></p>"))
else:
    html = "".join(_render_node(node) for node in hierarchy)
    display(HTML(html))
```

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Legend

- **🏆 Epic** — Portfolio-level initiative spanning multiple PIs and ARTs
- **🧩 Capability** — Large Solution-level deliverable decomposed from an Epic; fits within one PI
- **🛠️ Feature** — Service or function delivered by a single ART within one PI
- **⚠️** — % Done is below % of PI elapsed (at risk)
- **⛔** — Epic is blocked by one or more other epics
:::
